title: A study to see if colonoscopic decompression [a special tube fitted with camera which will be inserted through the anus ]can help you to reduce the abdominal high pressure
condition:
1.Intra abdominal hypertension [IAH]
2.colonoscopic decompression and its effect on Gastro intestinal mucosal  pH 
3.The effect of IAH  on various serum markers
,
inclusion_criteria:
1.	All patients in the Surgical ICU who have had an emergency laparotomy
a.	 for trauma or 
b.	intra-abdominal sepsis 

2.	Pancreatitis patients in the Surgical ICU
